A BUSINESS ORGANIZATION ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $3,564.44 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,564.44, IT IS ORDERED THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS JAMES JOSEPH HASSETT AND MCMILLAN ELECTIRIC CO AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF CHARLES M. ADAMS IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,564.44.
